final:
// // This module generates an output clock enable signal, ENCLK, which is set to LOW (0) on the positive edge of the input clock (CLK) whenever either the enable (EN) or test enable (TE) signals are HIGH.
module top_module(
    input CLK,
    input EN,
    input TE,
    output reg ENCLK
);always @ (posedge CLK) begin
    if (EN && TE) begin
        ENCLK <= 1;
    end else begin
        ENCLK <= 0;
    end
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module generates an output clock enable signal, ENCLK, which is set to LOW (0) on the positive edge of the input clock (CLK) whenever either the enable (EN) or test enable (TE) signals are HIGH.
